name: accept-specific-followup
description: Diya should approve a warm, specific follow-up that helps the student concretely.

input.title: Re: I am stuck on the I-20 funding section
input.payload: Hey Sneha — totally normal to get stuck here. For the I-20 funding section, the school usually asks for proof that you can cover one year of total cost (tuition + living + fees). Two things to gather before your next attempt: (1) a bank statement showing the full annual figure in your sponsor's name and (2) a one-page affidavit from your sponsor stating they will fund your education. If your sponsor is your parent, include their income source on the affidavit. I cannot review legal forms, but I can walk you through what each section is asking. Want me to do that now?
